moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The final weekend of the 2026 Wimbledon Championships is underway, with the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals taking place on Saturday and Sunday.

angles.name: Finals excitement
angles.copy: Who lifts the trophy today? It's Finals Weekend at Wimbledon 2026 – the culmination of two weeks of incredible tennis. Game, set, match!

angles.name: British hopes
angles.copy: Could we see a British champion at Wimbledon this weekend? The tension is building for the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals.

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup concludes tomorrow, July 12th, with the final match played in England.

angles.name: Cricket showdown
angles.copy: It's the big one tomorrow! The ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final is set to crown a champion on Sunday. Who are you backing?

angles.name: Hosting the final
angles.copy: England hosts the final of the ICC Women's T20 World Cup tomorrow. An incredible tournament reaching its climax!

moments.title: Goodwood Festival of Speed
moments.blurb: The Goodwood Festival of Speed, motorsport's ultimate summer garden party, is ongoing until Sunday, July 12th, in West Sussex.

angles.name: Motor magic
angles.copy: Engines roaring and history being made! Goodwood Festival of Speed is in full swing this weekend. What a spectacle!

angles.name: Final day tomorrow
angles.copy: Catch the last day of the Goodwood Festival of Speed tomorrow! Supercars, legends, and pure automotive exhilaration in West Sussex.

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival
moments.blurb: London's Kaleidoscope Festival returns today, July 11th, to Alexandra Palace Park for a day of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Ally Pally fun
angles.copy: Kaleidoscope Festival is happening right now at Alexandra Palace! Who's there soaking up the atmosphere and catching some amazing acts?

angles.name: London's festival vibe
angles.copy: The sun's out and the music's playing at Kaleidoscope Festival in London today. Perfect summer vibes!

moments.title: Lost Minds Festival Newcastle
moments.blurb: Lost Minds Festival takes over Newcastle today, July 11th, with a lineup of electronic music artists.

angles.name: Newcastle raving
angles.copy: Lost Minds Festival is bringing the beats to Newcastle today! Hope you're ready for an epic day of dance music.

angles.name: Dance all day
angles.copy: The North East is alive with sound as Lost Minds Festival kicks off! Get your dance shoes on!

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival continues in Birmingham this weekend, running from July 10-12.

angles.name: Birmingham grooves
angles.copy: Birmingham is grooving this weekend with the Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival! Catch the vibes today and tomorrow.

angles.name: Festival highlights
angles.copy: Who's been enjoying the amazing acts at Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul in Birmingham? So much talent on show!

moments.title: BST Hyde Park concludes
moments.blurb: The British Summer Time (BST) Hyde Park festival wraps up its 2026 run tomorrow, July 12th, after weeks of star-studded performances.

angles.name: Summer's end
angles.copy: It's the final day of BST Hyde Park tomorrow! What were your favourite moments from this year's incredible line-up?

angles.name: Hyde Park memories
angles.copy: One last chance to experience BST Hyde Park tomorrow. From legends to new stars, it's been a summer to remember!

moments.title: The Open Championship begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship in golf officially begins on Thursday, July 16th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport.

angles.name: Golf's biggest prize
angles.copy: The countdown is on! The Open Championship tees off at Royal Birkdale next Thursday. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale ready
angles.copy: Practice days are already underway at Royal Birkdale ahead of The Open. The course looks magnificent for golf's return!

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival takes place from July 15-18, 2026, in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland.

angles.name: Island festival
angles.copy: Get ready for the HebCelt Festival starting next Wednesday! A fantastic celebration of music and culture in the Outer Hebrides.

angles.name: Scottish summer
angles.copy: Stornoway comes alive next week for the Hebridean Celtic Festival. Who's heading to the islands for some incredible live music?

moments.title: Love Island UK continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13 is in full swing, airing nightly (except Saturdays for 'Unseen Bits') at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Villa drama
angles.copy: Another week, more drama in the Love Island villa! What's been your biggest talking point from the show so far?

angles.name: Tonight's episode
angles.copy: Settling in for Love Island 'Unseen Bits' tonight? Get ready for all the moments you missed from the week!

moments.title: New ITV thriller 'The Dark'
moments.blurb: A new six-part ITV thriller, 'The Dark', adapted from G.R. Halliday's novel and starring Laura Donnelly, premieres tomorrow, July 12th.

angles.name: New Sunday night drama
angles.copy: Get ready for a chilling new thriller! ITV's 'The Dark' premieres tomorrow night. Who's tuning in for some Scottish Highlands mystery?

angles.name: Gripping new series
angles.copy: If you love a good crime thriller, mark your calendars for 'The Dark' starting Sunday on ITV. Looks intense!

moments.title: Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid'
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', about a robot companion, which premieres on Thursday, July 17th.

angles.name: New comedy alert
angles.copy: Diane Morgan as a robot? Yes please! 'Ann Droid' hits BBC One next Thursday. This is going to be hilarious.

angles.name: Motherland star returns
angles.copy: From Motherland to an NHS companion robot, Diane Morgan's new comedy 'Ann Droid' is a must-watch next week!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Lil' Kim
moments.blurb: Influential American rapper Lil' Kim turns 52 today, July 11th.

angles.name: Queen Bee celebrates
angles.copy: Happy 52nd Birthday to the one and only Queen Bee, Lil' Kim! Forever iconic and groundbreaking.

angles.name: Hip Hop Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Lil' Kim, who turns 52 today! What's your favourite track from the hip hop legend?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Richie Sambora
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi guitarist and rock icon Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday today, July 11th.

angles.name: Rock god's day
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 67th Birthday to the legendary Richie Sambora! What's your favourite Bon Jovi riff he blessed us with?

angles.name: Bon Jovi guitar hero
angles.copy: The guitar hero turns 67 today! Happy Birthday to Richie Sambora, a true rock icon.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Alessia Cara
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning Canadian singer-songwriter Alessia Cara celebrates her 30th birthday today, July 11th.

angles.name: Pop star turns 30
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday to the incredible Alessia Cara! What's your go-to track from her?

angles.name: Celebrating Alessia
angles.copy: The amazing Alessia Cara celebrates her 30th birthday today! Send her some love!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: The Police drummer and rock legend Stewart Copeland turns 74 on July 16th.

angles.name: Police drummer's day
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we're celebrating the 74th birthday of the legendary Stewart Copeland! What's your favourite Police track?

angles.name: Rock icon
angles.copy: The incredible Stewart Copeland, drummer for The Police, turns 74 on July 16th. A true musical innovator!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Luke Hemmings
moments.blurb: 5 Seconds of Summer frontman Luke Hemmings celebrates his 30th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: 5SOS star turns 30
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 30th Birthday to 5 Seconds of Summer's very own Luke Hemmings next Thursday! Feel old yet?

angles.name: Pop-punk prince
angles.copy: Luke Hemmings celebrates his 30th next week! What's your favourite 5SOS song?

moments.title: Bruno Mars in London
moments.blurb: Bruno Mars brings his 'The One and Only Show' to London's Tottenham Hotspur Stadium next Friday, July 18th, for the first of five UK dates.

angles.name: Bruno's back!
angles.copy: Bruno Mars is bringing the funk to London next Friday! Who's got tickets to see the '24K Magic' man at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium?

angles.name: London getting funky
angles.copy: Get ready, London! Bruno Mars kicks off his UK shows next week. It's going to be a party!

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, featuring world-class track and field athletes, takes place at the London Stadium on Thursday, July 18th.

angles.name: Track and field stars
angles.copy: World-class athletics comes to London Stadium next Thursday! Who's excited for the London Athletics Meet?

angles.name: Fastest in London
angles.copy: See the world's best athletes compete next week at the London Athletics Meet. Don't miss it!

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart latest
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart was updated today/yesterday, reflecting the biggest tracks in the country right now.

angles.name: Chart topper
angles.copy: What's sitting at number one on the Official UK Singles Chart this week? Tune in to find out the nation's favourite!

angles.name: New music ruling
angles.copy: New music dominating the Official UK Singles Chart! Which tracks are you streaming this weekend?

moments.title: Summer Holidays in full swing
moments.blurb: With schools breaking up and good weather (hopefully!) on the horizon, the UK summer holidays are now in full swing for many families.

angles.name: School's out!
angles.copy: Happy summer holidays to everyone off school! What are your plans for soaking up the sunshine (fingers crossed!)?

angles.name: Beat the heat
angles.copy: Making the most of the summer weather? Remember to stay hydrated and slap on that sun cream!
